label: sandbox_diagnostics • bare `apk add` redirects to sandbox_install
notes: A model ran `apk add curl` directly in sandbox_exec. apk needs root, so the unprivileged agent shell fails to lock the package database (exit 1). The self-heal hint must fire and point at sandbox_install (manager:"apk") so the refresh + retry + cross-agent serialization harness applies instead of a bare bash install.

sandboxDiagnostics.stderr:
ERROR: Unable to lock database: Permission denied
ERROR: Failed to open apk database: Permission denied
